data.title: Rename test file and update .test-index for using-dso paths (RED)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## What
Rename tests/skills/test-using-lockpick-clarification.sh → tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh and update all internal references from using-lockpick to using-dso. Update .test-index to reflect the renamed source key and test file, and add a RED marker so the pre-commit test gate tolerates the expected failure (the skill directory using-dso/ does not exist yet until Task 2).

## Implementation Steps
1. `git mv tests/skills/test-using-lockpick-clarification.sh tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh`
2. Edit tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh:
   - Line 2: `# tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh`
   - Line 4: update description to reference using-dso
   - Line 24: update echo banner to `test-using-dso-clarification.sh`
   - Line 32: `SKILL_MD="$DSO_PLUGIN_DIR/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md"`
   - Line 33: `HOOK_MD="$DSO_PLUGIN_DIR/skills/using-dso/HOOK-INJECTION.md"`
   - Line 37: update echo to reference test-using-dso-clarification.sh
3. Edit .test-index:
   - Rename source key `plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/SKILL.md` → `plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md`
   - In the renamed key's test list, add RED marker: replace `tests/skills/test-using-lockpick-clarification.sh` with `tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh [test_skill_md_has_clarification_section]`
   - In the `plugins/dso/skills/ui-discover/lock.sh` line, rename `tests/skills/test-using-lockpick-clarification.sh` → `tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh`

## TDD Requirement
Given: plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/ does NOT yet exist (only using-lockpick/ exists).
When: bash tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh is run.
Then: test exits non-zero (RED) because SKILL_MD path resolves to a non-existent file. This RED failure is expected and tolerated by the [test_skill_md_has_clarification_section] marker in .test-index.

The modify-existing-test RED marker pattern allows committing this failing test state. Task 2 turns it GREEN by completing the rename.

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test-using-lockpick-clarification.sh (renamed to test-using-dso-clarification.sh)
- .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Renamed test file exists: tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh
- [ ] Old test file does not exist
  Verify: test ! -f tests/skills/test-using-lockpick-clarification.sh
- [ ] No using-lockpick string references remain in the renamed test file
  Verify: ! grep -q "using-lockpick" tests/skills/test-using-dso-clarification.sh
- [ ] .test-index source key updated to using-dso
  Verify: grep -q "plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md" .test-index
- [ ] .test-index contains RED marker for test-using-dso-clarification.sh
  Verify: grep -q "test-using-dso-clarification.sh \[test_skill_md_has_clarification_section\]" .test-index
- [ ] Old test file reference removed from all .test-index lines
  Verify: ! grep -q "test-using-lockpick-clarification.sh" .test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits (RED marker in .test-index tolerates the failing test)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh; echo "exit: $?"
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
